sprint_history.name: Oppenheim Prediction Analysis
sprint_history.key_finding: S_a = Ghbar/R^3 not unique to FDCG. Mass-independence at fixed R is the diagnostic.

sprint_history.name: Noise Spectrum Derivation
sprint_history.key_finding: S_a ~ Ghbar/R^3 derivable, white at lab frequencies. Distinctive from standard QG.

sprint_history.name: h_00 Construction
sprint_history.key_finding: Gauge enhancement fails. Theory has 5 DOF not 2.

sprint_history.name: Extra DOF Decoupling
sprint_history.key_finding: Mass degeneracy theorem: m_TT = m_V (Schur's lemma).

sprint_history.name: Derivative Mass Splitting
sprint_history.key_finding: Derivative ops vanish at k=0. Exact to all orders and all loops.

sprint_history.name: Nematic Condensation
sprint_history.key_finding: Wrong Goldstones: SO(3)->SO(2) gives spin-1 not spin-2.

sprint_history.name: RG Flow of g2
sprint_history.key_finding: Pure theory is Gaussian (no running). Elasticity duality shows g2 is stable.
